{"author": null, "closed_at": null, "collaborating_teams": null, "collaborating_users": null, "created_at": null, "credits": [{"login": "sec-reex", "type": "reporter"}], "credits_detailed": [{"state": "accepted", "type": "reporter", "user": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/268716145?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/sec-reex/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/sec-reex/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/sec-reex/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/sec-reex/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/sec-reex", "id": 268716145, "login": "sec-reex", "node_id": "U_kgDOEARIcQ", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/sec-reex/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/sec-reex/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/sec-reex/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/sec-reex/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/sec-reex/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/sec-reex", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-59766", "cvss": {"score": 4.3, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:L/UI:N/S:U/C:L/I:N/A:N"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 4.3, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:L/UI:N/S:U/C:L/I:N/A:N"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": null, "vector_string": null}}, "cwe_ids": [], "cwes": [], "description": "## Summary
CVE-2026-20800 fixed private-info leakage to revoked users only for the notification endpoint. Two
sibling endpoints that return data keyed on the caller's own relationship still do not re-check repo
access at output time:
- `GET /api/v1/user/starred` — `getStarredRepos()` computes a per-repo permission but still lists every
  starred repo (no filtering), so the full repo object (`full_name`, `private`, `clone_url`, `ssh_url`)
  of a now-inaccessible private repo is returned.
- `GET /api/v1/user/times` — `ListMyTrackedTimes()` queries by `UserID` only and `LoadAttributes` brings
  in the issue (`title`, `state`), leaking private issue titles after revocation.

## Steps to reproduce
Using the provided reproduction materials, as a revoked user:
1. Control: `GET /api/v1/repos/admin/starred-test` → **404**.
2. `GET /api/v1/user/starred` → leaks `admin/starred-test`, `private:true`, `clone_url`.
3. `GET /api/v1/user/times` → leaks `issue.title = "SECRET: …"`, `state`.

(Runtime-confirmed on `gitea/gitea:1.25.4`. Oracle = planted sentinel title; no real secret exfiltrated.)

## Impact
A former collaborator can enumerate private repos they starred and read private issue titles they logged
time on, indefinitely after access revocation. Metadata only (no repo content / comment bodies). Low.

## Suggested remediation
1. `getStarredRepos`: drop (or minimally redact) repos where `permission.HasAnyUnitAccessOrPublicAccess()`
   is false for the caller.
2. `ListMyTrackedTimes`: filter tracked-time entries by current repo access.
3. Optionally clear a user's stars / time entries for a private repo on revocation.

## Credit
Reported as part of an incomplete-patch measurement study (responsible disclosure).", "ghsa_id": "GHSA-qf2f-qh6p-7v89", "html_url": "https://github.com/go-gitea/gitea/security/advisories/GHSA-qf2f-qh6p-7v89", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-qf2f-qh6p-7v89"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-59766"}], "private_fork": null, "published_at": "2026-07-13T17:28:40Z", "publisher": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/75789103?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/bircni/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/bircni/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/bircni/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/bircni/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/bircni", "id": 75789103, "login": "bircni", "node_id": "MDQ6VXNlcjc1Nzg5MTAz", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/bircni/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/bircni/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/bircni/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/bircni/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/bircni/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/bircni", "user_view_type": "public"}, "severity": "medium", "state": "published", "submission": null, "summary": "CVE-2026-20800 sibling endpoints not covered: revoked user still reads private repo objects via `/api/v1/user/starred` and private issue titles via `/api/v1/user/times`", "updated_at": "2026-07-18T20:02:59Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/repos/go-gitea/gitea/security-advisories/GHSA-qf2f-qh6p-7v89", "vulnerabilities": [{"package": {"ecosystem": "go", "name": "code.gitea.io/gitea"}, "patched_versions": "1.27.0", "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "1.25.4"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

reasons: 資産不一致または判定情報不足

title: CVE-2026-20800 sibling endpoints not covered: revoked user still reads private repo objects via `/api/v1/user/starred` and private issue titles via `/api/v1/user/times`
